assertions.title: Unified search output can drive source-native retrieval directly

steps.expected: One normalized arxiv paper object is returned with source=arxiv and paper_id=1234.5678v1.
steps.observed: exit 0; returned 1 paper with normalized fields source=arxiv paper_id=1234.5678v1 pdf_url=http://127.0.0.1:18361/pdf/1234.5678v1.pdf.

steps.action: Feed the returned paper object directly into `download --paper-json` without extra source-specific translation.
steps.expected: Source-native retrieval succeeds using normalized source and paper_id fields only.

assertions.title: Unified search output can drive fallback retrieval directly

steps.action: Run built CLI search with SEARCH_PAPER_ARXIV_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:18361/arxiv for a record that only exposes DOI/title metadata.
steps.expected: Unified search returns a normalized paper object whose doi/title can be reused directly.
steps.observed: exit 0; returned DOI 10.1000/artifact-fallback-1 and title Artifact Fallback Retrieval with no pdf_url.

steps.action: Feed the returned paper object directly into `download --fallback --paper-json` with repository and Unpaywall fixture env vars.
steps.expected: Fallback chain uses normalized doi/title fields and succeeds without source-specific schema translation.
steps.observed: exit 0; state=downloaded; winning_stage=unpaywall; attempts=['primary:not_found', 'repositories:not_found', 'repositories:not_found', 'repositories:not_found', 'repositories:not_found', 'unpaywall:downloaded']; saved PDF to /root/workspace/github/jtsang4/search-paper-cli/.tmp/user-testing/group-artifact-e2e/val-cross-004/save/10.1000-artifact-fallback-1.pdf.

assertions.title: Built artifact can execute a real end-to-end flow outside the source tree

steps.action: Copy dist/search-paper-cli_linux_amd64/search-paper-cli into an isolated outside-repo directory and run `--help` there.
steps.expected: Copied release artifact runs outside the repository and exposes the packaged CLI surface.
steps.observed: exit 0; help output listed search, download, read, sources, and version commands from the copied binary in outside-run/bin/search-paper-cli.

steps.action: From the outside-repo directory, run `search --source arxiv "artifact outside flow"` using only the outside directory `.env`.
steps.expected: Artifact performs search outside the source tree and returns one normalized paper object.

steps.action: From the outside-repo directory, run `download --fallback --paper-json <search result>` into outside-run/downloads.
steps.expected: Artifact completes a realistic end-to-end search + fallback retrieval flow outside the repo.
steps.observed: exit 0; state=downloaded; winning_stage=unpaywall; saved PDF to /root/workspace/github/jtsang4/search-paper-cli/.tmp/user-testing/group-artifact-e2e/outside-run/downloads/10.1000-artifact-outside-1.pdf.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. Built artifact search output drove native retrieval and fallback retrieval directly, and a copied release artifact completed an outside-repo search-plus-fallback flow successfully.
